steps.title: Read two graph intercepts
steps.content: The line shown passes through the intercepts $(0,40)$ and $(60,0)$. A matching equation must be true for both points.

steps.title: Test the intercept equation
steps.content:
Substitute each intercept into the equation with both variables on one side.
$$8(0)+12(40)=480$$
$$8(60)+12(0)=480$$
Both substitutions give $480=480$.

steps.title: Match the line model
steps.content: The graph slopes downward, so the equations with positive slope do not fit. The equation that works for both intercepts is $8x+12y=480$. The answer is B.
